steps.title: Identify the broader context Text 2 reveals
steps.content: Text 2 shows that Morrison's sermon use reflects “a community-wide strategy of resistance to externally imposed literary conventions”—a crucial context that Text 1's claim about Ellison's direct influence completely overlooks.

steps.title: Identify the characterization
steps.content: The remaining alternative uses of the sermon within the wider cultural context in which they wrote captures the central oversight: the claim fails to place both authors' equivalent uses of the sermon in the wider cultural context.
